{{Quote|A few years ago, I was captured by the Empire. I was scouting on Althir with my friend Milo, and we ran into an Imperial strike team.|[[Felix Iresso]]|<ref name="TH">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Treasure Hunting|Follow the Droid}}</ref>}}
'''Althir III''', or '''Althir''', was a remote, independent [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Althir system/Legends|Althir system]] that was located outside of the borders of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It had a system of rocky planetary rings.

==History==
Discovered by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] early in the [[Old Sith Wars]], it was the site of two major battles. Not a member of the Republic, the native [[Althiri]] were forced to defend themselves when the [[Battle of Althir (first)|first battle]] took place in [[3976 BBY]]. As [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] invaded, the warriors of Althir fought valiantly against the barbarous conquerors but were eventually cowed under the forces of [[Canderous Ordo]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

While under Mandalorian rule for several years, Althir III was liberated when the Republic [[Battle of Althir (second)|stormed]] the planet circa [[3960 BBY]]. Leading the charge, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] was credited with handing a massive blow to the Mandalorian army.<ref name="The New Essential Chronology">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Not long after, Revan turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark side of the Force]] and deemed himself [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]. Along with his followers, Revan established an [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Empire]] to counter the Republic. Joining the Empire, Althir III would remain with Revan until the Republic beat back the Sith and once more rose victorious against the enemies of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. At the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], a proxy conflict between the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], a [[Unidentified rich smuggler|nearly-dead smuggler]] programmed the coordinates of his great wealth into a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that then went missing on Althir. Eventually, someone was sent to retrieve the droid on the planet and acquire the treasure.<ref name="TH" />

Not aligning with the Republic after the war, it remained in contested space throughout the [[New Sith Wars]] up until the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] when it was deemed safe to allow the planet to remain independent.<ref name="TEA" />

Free of the evils of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Althir III's space was taken by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] during his [[Hunt for Zsinj|campaign]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Eventually freed from Zsinj's rule, the world reasserted independence and did not join the Republic even after surrounding space was conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. While its status during the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] is unknown, Althir III was forced to become a member of the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]] of [[Darth Krayt]].<ref name="TEA" />
